title: Arts. 1158 to 1161 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 5--OF THE CAUSES FOR WHICH A CURATOR OF A

SUCCESSION MAY BE DISMISSED OR SUPERSEDED

Art. 1158.  Arts. 1158 to 1161 Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
